title: × cheirysimum intermedium
intro: × Cheiranthus intermedium, commonly known as the Intermediate Wallflower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to aid in respiratory issues and as an expectorant, helping to clear mucus from the lungs. The health benefits of × Cheiranthus intermedium include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
